label: allergy_budget_cities
input_turn: Planning a trip to Tokyo and Kyoto next month. My total budget is $3,000. I'm severely allergic to shellfish.
prompt_sent: Extract entities and relations as JSON: Planning a trip to Tokyo and Kyoto next month. My total budget is $3,000. I'm severely allergic to shellfish.

entities.name: Tokyo
entities.description: Capital city of Japan, located in the eastern part of the country.

entities.name: Kyoto
entities.description: Cultural and historical city in western Japan, known for its well-preserved traditional architecture and gardens.

entities.name: Budget
entities.description: Total amount allocated for the trip, $3,000.
